recommendations.title: Breaking & Exiting
recommendations.overview: Harry, a charming house thief, gets more than he bargains for during an attempted burglary when he stumbles upon Daisy and decides to save her from herself, sending both of them into a darkly comedic journey of self discovery and love.

recommendations.title: Albino Alligator
recommendations.overview: While escaping from a foiled robbery attempt, three thieves find themselves surrounded by police at a New Orleans bar--only they're not the people the police are searching for.

recommendations.title: The Vanished
recommendations.overview: A family vacation takes a terrifying turn when parents Paul and Wendy discover their young daughter has vanished without a trace. Stopping at nothing to find her, the search for the truth leads to a shocking revelation.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Sea
recommendations.overview: Based on the life and career of legendary entertainer, Bobby Darin, the biopic moves back and forth between his childhood and adulthood, to tell the tale of his life.

recommendations.title: Penelope
recommendations.overview: Forlorn heiress Penelope Wilhern is cursed, and the only way out is to fall in love with someone of suitable stock. But how can she find her soulmate when she's sequestered inside her family's estate with only her parents to keep her company? This un

recommendations.title: The Seventh Company Outdoors
recommendations.overview: The third part of Seventh Company adventures.

recommendations.title: Spanish Affair 2
recommendations.overview: Amaia after breaking up with Rafa, falls in love with a Catalonian. Koldo, her father, goes to Sevilla to persuade Rafa to go to Catalonia and take Amaia's heart back.

recommendations.title: Al posto tuo
recommendations.overview: Two very different men have something in common: the work. When their companies are bought by a bigger one, who will take the only place of boss of the new company?

recommendations.title: Dear Wendy
recommendations.overview: In a blue-collar American town, a group of teens bands together to form the Dandies, a gang of gunslingers led by Dick Dandelion. Following a code of strict pacifism at odds with the fact that they all carry guns, the group eventually lets in Sebasti

recommendations.title: Baby Driver
recommendations.overview: After being coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver finds himself taking part in a heist doomed to fail.
